# cancel()

**Instance Method**

Starts the animated dismissal of the compose view.

## Declaration

```swift
func cancel()
```

## Discussion

When the cancel animation finishes, this method calls [doc://com.apple.social/documentation/Social/SLComposeServiceViewController/didSelectCancel()]. A subclass shouldn’t need to override `cancel`. In rare cases a subclass may call `cancel`, such as in response to a catastrophic failure during user interaction with the compose view.
title: cancel()
